offplan.title: 3 Bedroom Bungalow
offplan.description: 3 bedroom bungalow on a 70 by 100 plot of land. Comes with 3 bedrooms, 4 washrooms, pool and a large compound. Natural facade with stones, wood and lots of greenery.

offplan.title: Modern Scandi Cabin
offplan.description: Compact cabin with vertical timber cladding, metal roof, open-plan layout with high ceilings, extensive glazing, and modern Scandi aesthetic.

offplan.title: T-Shaped Cabin
offplan.description: Single-family house with T-shaped design, where one wing contains common and service areas, and the perpendicular wing contains private areas. 2 bedrooms, 3 washrooms.

offplan.title: 3 Bedroom Duplex
offplan.description: 3 bedroom, 4 washrooms, 2 living rooms with every bedroom ensuite. Features large windows, pool, serene outdoor spaces, greens, and large 270° balcony for great views.

offplan.title: 3 Bedroom Bungalow
offplan.description: Master bedroom with toilet and closet area, 2 standard bedrooms with toilet, large living room with space, dining, modern kitchen with store.

offplan.title: 3 Bedroom Family Home
offplan.description: Designed for calm and peaceful living, with features that make retirement feel better. Great floor plan with ease in moving, sunlight, fresh natural air.

offplan.title: Modern Retirement Bungalow
offplan.description: Precision engineered modern map with optimal space planning, natural light & ventilation, premium layout with master bedroom, open kitchen, and future-ready design.

offplan.title: 3+1 Bedroom House
offplan.description: Very nice and simple 3 bedroom house with one bedroom Boy's Quarters and a garden. All bedrooms en-suite with huge living room.

offplan.title: 4 Bedroom Townhouse with Boy's Quarters
offplan.description: Spacious 4 family bedroom townhouses with boy's quarters, featuring modern design, ample parking, and premium finishes. Perfect for families seeking comfort and elegance.

offplan.title: 2 Bedroom Leisure Home
offplan.description: Beautiful 2 bedroom leisure home perfect for vacation getaways. Features modern amenities, scenic views, and comfortable living spaces ideal for relaxation.

offplan.title: 2 Bedroom Leisure Home - Aburi
offplan.description: Stunning 2 bedroom leisure home nestled in the serene hills of Aburi. Perfect for weekend retreats with beautiful mountain views, fresh air, and peaceful surroundings.

offplan.title: 4 Bedroom Family Home
offplan.description: A residential project developed under a contemporary and functional vision. Architecture defined by sober volumes, clean lines, and carefully selected materials. Prioritizes natural lighting and balanced spaces.

offplan.title: 3 Bedroom Beach Home
offplan.description: Who decided bedrooms shouldn't feel like a beachfront observatory? And since when is marble allowed to look this soft? Is this still architecture, or already the world's calmest movie scene?

offplan.title: Green Mountain Vacation Home
offplan.description: Concrete floating over a silent valley of Aburi. Warm timber behind cold mass. Glass framing mountains like artwork. Architecture is strongest when it does less.

offplan.title: 3 Bedroom Family Home
offplan.description: A project born under a minimalist and contemporary vision, where every line and every volume stands out from its surroundings, creating a harmonious contrast with the surrounding landscape.

offplan.title: Vacation Home with Great Views
offplan.description: Stripped down to the essentials, this architectural concept proves that true luxury lies in simplicity and connection to the land.

offplan.title: 3 Bedroom Vacation Home
offplan.description: With brave lines, long hanging extensions, and a feel of hanging in the air, this beautiful vacation home is built on a mountain top of Aburi with great views and a touch of nature's beauty.

offplan.title: 3 Bedroom Duplex
offplan.description: Designed for a half plot in an era where land is scarce and expensive, the 3 bedroom duplex is planned for the family. Big airy spaces are safely designed with children in mind.

offplan.title: 5 Bedroom Family Home
offplan.description: A residence that blends the strength of exposed concrete, the warmth of wood, and the elegance of stone - seamlessly connected with nature and natural light.

offplan.title: 4 Bedroom Duplex
offplan.description: 4 bedroom house on a half plot. Comes with a pool and a touch of greenery. Option of a maid's quarters. Contact us now.

offplan.title: 4 Bedroom Duplex with Underground Garage
offplan.description: From the most challenging terrains, emerge the most incredible projects. Balestra House is the perfect combination of daring and beauty. Unique features and impressive volume are the hallmark of this project.

offplan.title: 4 Bedroom Duplex
offplan.description: The world suggests a choice between raw power and refined elegance. This is a space for those who understood the answer is to embody both. A testament to a life lived in perfect equilibrium.

offplan.title: 5 Bedroom Home
offplan.description: This house consists of two floors, which are zoned as public and private areas. The three primary areas pantry, dining and living room are located on the 2nd floor, while the private area is on the first.

offplan.title: 3 Bedroom Home
offplan.description: This project is a reflection of architecture-minimal, intentional, and deeply connected to its landscape. The house is situated on a lush, sloping terrain at the base of a mountain range.

offplan.title: SAINTTEST
offplan.description: i said it should work
